data.title: Coinbase establishes board to evaluate impact of quantum computing on blockchain security, with experts to publish reports.
data.description: A panel of experts from various sectors, including researchers and industry professionals, is set to release publications addressing digital-security threats. The board aims to provide valuable information on risks and best practices for developers, businesses, and individuals to enhance online safety.

data.title: WEC Energy Group raises dividend by 6.7% to 95.25 cents per share; was 89.25 cents before. #finance #investing
data.description: The board of directors at WEC Energy Group (NYSE: WEC) in Milwaukee announced on January 22, 2026, that a quarterly cash dividend of 95.25 cents per share has been declared for the company's common stock. This marks a significant increase of 6.7 percent from the previous quarterly dividend of 89.25 cents per share.

data.title: Pella Corporation and Premise Health open Wellness Center in Pella, Iowa; powered by Premise Health, largest direct healthcare company.
data.description: In Brentwood, Tennessee, on January 22, 2026, Pella Corporation, a prominent windows and doors manufacturer, marked the launch of the Pella Corporation Wellness Center in Pella, Iowa. The center is operated by Premise Health, the primary direct healthcare company catering to major employers.

data.title: Elite youth volleyball teams compete at SoCal Cup's 'The Open Championship' at Salt Palace Convention Center, with 200+ teams in 15U-18U age groups.
data.description: In Salt Lake City, the renowned SoCal Cup, part of the leading boys volleyball event series in the United States, hosted 'The Open Championship' at the Salt Palace Convention Center over the Martin Luther King Jr. weekend. The event, organized by AIM Sports Group, attracted over 200 boys club volleyball teams aged 15U–18U from various parts of the country. Participants engaged in fierce competition for direct bids to AAU Nationals.

data.title: Flagship Honda in San Juan releases research on 2026 Honda HR-V, aiding local drivers in selecting their ideal SUV.
data.description: A prominent Honda dealership in San Juan, Flagship Honda, is offering detailed information and availability of the 2026 Honda HR-V to assist local drivers in selecting the ideal SUV for their needs. Located in SAN JUAN, Puerto Rico, the dealership is excited to provide the latest data and inventory to potential buyers. The 2026 Honda HR-V boasts cutting-edge features and designs, making it a highly sought-after option. This initiative aims to help customers make informed decisions about their vehicle purchase. This development was announced on Jan. 22, 2026, marking an important step in Flagship Honda's commitment to customer satisfaction.

data.title: Trump files $5B lawsuit against JP Morgan for debanking, blaming Biden administration for banks dropping him as a client.
data.description: The former president attributed bank executives dropping him as a client to the Biden administration rather than the executives themselves.

data.title: PainReform Ltd. rebrands to PRF Technologies Ltd., expanding into healthcare and AI energy, approved by shareholders on Jan 6, 2026.
data.description: The name change was approved by shareholders at the Annual General Meeting on January 6, 2026, signaling the company's transition away from a single-asset focus. This move reflects a shift towards a more diversified business strategy.

data.title: Leverage Shares introduces 6 new single stock leveraged ETFs (USAR, ONDS, PLUG, ALB, HUT, UUUU) for trading.
data.description: In Greenwich, Connecticut, on January 13, 2026, Leverage Shares by Themes has launched six new single-stock leveraged ETFs. These ETFs will commence trading on the same date and are aimed at enabling investors to increase returns and actively participate in the performance of USA Rare Earth, Ondas Holdings, Plug Power, Albemarle, Hut 8, and Energy Fuels. The products allow for amplified returns in both upward and downward market movements.

data.title: Stock futures swing, jobless claims drop unexpectedly, manufacturing activity rebounds. Nasdaq fell 1%, Dow up 0.11%, Nasdaq 100 up 0.75%.Import prices rose by 0.4% in two months. Goldman Sachs lower in premarket. Tariff uncertainty persists. CME Group shows 95% likelihood of Fed keeping rates unchanged in January.
data.description: U.S. stock futures experienced volatility on Thursday after a lower close on Wednesday, with major benchmark indices showing mixed movements. Initial jobless claims unexpectedly dropped to 198,000, indicating labor market tightness, while manufacturing activity in the Northeast rebounded with the Empire State and Philadelphia Fed indexes climbing to 7.7 and 12.6. U.S. import prices rose 0.4% over the two months ending in November. The Nasdaq Composite fell 1% due to reports of a 25% tariff on select semiconductor imports, amidst ongoing tariff uncertainty. The 10-year Treasury bond yield was at 4.15%, and the two-year bond at 3.52%. The CME Group's FedWatch tool projected a 95% likelihood of the Federal Reserve keeping interest rates unchanged in January. Stock index performances were mixed, with the S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF tracking the S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 indices respectively registering gains in premarket trading. Goldman Sachs reported quarterly earnings of $14.01 per share, surpassing expectations but with revenue slightly below estimates, causing a 1.79% drop in premarket trade. The article is available on Benzinga.com with more details.

data.title: NVIDIA boosts AI image generation speed by 10x on Blackwell Data Center GPUs with NVFP4 optimizations. Multi-GPU scaling nearly linear.
data.description: The latest NVFP4 optimizations from NVIDIA have resulted in a remarkable 10.2 times increase in FLUX.2 inference speed on Blackwell B200 GPUs compared to H200. Additionally, these optimizations have showcased near-linear scaling when utilizing multiple GPUs. This development signifies a significant advancement in GPU performance and efficiency, demonstrating the potential for enhanced computing capabilities.

data.title: Port Saint John completed CAD$247M West Side Modernization with DP World investment, expanding capacity to 1M TEUs, enhancing Canadian trade.
data.description: The West Side Modernization project in Port Saint John has been successfully finished with a total investment of CAD$247 million, with DP World being a key contributor. This development has significantly boosted the port's capacity to handle up to 1 million twenty-foot equivalent units (TEUs), enhancing its role in facilitating Canadian trade activities.

data.title: Universal Token, Inc. ($UTKN) and The SUSTECH Bank partner to enhance digital asset infrastructure in Africa & Asia.
data.description: Universal Token, Inc. (stock symbol: $UTKN) has recently entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with The SUSTECH Bank to form a strategic alliance. This partnership is aimed at accelerating the development of institutional digital assets. This collaboration is anticipated to have a significant impact in the digital asset sector, given the resources and expertise of the two entities involved. The MoU signifies a commitment to work closely together to leverage their respective strengths and propel advancements in the realm of digital assets. It is expected that through this alliance, innovative solutions and technologies will be introduced to the market, benefiting both companies and their stakeholders.

data.title: Fed's Kashkari optimistic about US economy, sees easing inflation but warns of 'price bump'. Inflation still 'too high' but moving in right direction. Fed aims to maintain 2% inflation target.
data.description: Neel Kashkari, President of the Federal Reserve Bank of Minneapolis, expressed positivity regarding the U.S. economy, projecting continuous growth and a decline in inflation. In a virtual event with the Wisconsin Bankers Association, Kashkari mentioned that although inflation remains "too high," it is heading in a favorable direction. He specifically highlighted an expected drop in inflation across housing sectors. Kashkari pondered whether inflation would reach two and a half percent by year-end or fall below or exceed that threshold. He underscored the Fed's dedication to achieving its 2% inflation goal and does not foresee any... The detailed article is accessible.

data.title: Taiwan Semiconductor beats views, guides higher, lifting sector. Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley beat earnings.
data.description: Taiwan Semiconductor exceeded expectations and provided optimistic guidance for the future. Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley both surpassed earnings forecasts. Nvidia chipmaker Taiwan Semiconductor saw a significant increase, causing a positive shift in the sector. The post-Dow Jones Futures reported the upward movement, with investor attention on the strong performance of Taiwan Semiconductor and the mixed earnings of Goldman Sachs.

data.title: Trump will not remove Powell as Fed chair amid DOJ probe, considering Warsh or Hassett as potential replacements.
data.description: President Donald Trump has asserted that he has no plans to remove Jerome Powell as Federal Reserve chair amidst an ongoing investigation by the Department of Justice. Trump mentioned in an interview with Reuters that his administration is currently evaluating next steps with Powell and is in a holding pattern. He declined to give specifics, citing it as premature. Trump also hinted at potential replacements for Powell, including Kevin Warsh or Kevin Hassett. He ruled out Scott Bessent for the role, as Bessent expressed a desire to stay in his current position. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: MT Højgaard Denmark finalizes a DKK 2.6 billion contract for building new Danish Defence barracks.
data.description: MT Højgaard Holding's division MT Højgaard Denmark and PensionDanmark secured a Public Private Partnership deal on December 2, 2025. This contract involves funding, designing, constructing, and managing accommodation structures for the Danish Defence. Following the voluntary pause period, the parties finalized the agreement with an approximate value of DKK 2.6 billion today.
